reason: The statement applies because the text describes the tragic destruction of Korah, Dathan, Abiram, and their followers who rebelled against Moses and Aaron, and were consumed by the earth opening up and swallowing them alive, along with their families and possessions. Additionally, a fire from the LORD consumed two hundred and fifty men who offered incense in rebellion. Furthermore, a plague broke out among the people, resulting in the death of fourteen thousand and seven hundred individuals, as a consequence of the rebellion and murmuring against Moses and Aaron.
